results.title: Scientists Create Synthetic Cell That Can Feed, Grow, and Replicate
results.description: Scientists say they have created a fully synthetic cell that can feed, grow, replicate its genome, and divide, marking a major step toward building life-like systems from non-living chemical components. The team from the University of Minnesota says its synthetic cell, called “SpudCell,” is the “first synthetic cell with a complete cell cycle.” Researchers say [...] The post Scientists Create Synthetic Cell That Can Feed, Grow, and Replicate appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Declan Rice Prepares for Challenging World Cup Match Against Mexico
results.description: As England gears up for their World Cup clash against Mexico, midfielder Declan Rice reflects on the challenges posed by the iconic Azteca Stadium and the passionate home crowd. He emphasizes that the team's focus remains on performance rather than the venue. Despite concerns about weather affecting the match timing, it is confirmed to kick off as scheduled. Rice's insights reveal the team's determination to treat this historic stadium like any other as they aim for victory.

results.title: Modi congratulates US on 250th Independence Anniversary, hails India-US partnership
results.description: New Delhi, July 4. Prime Minister Narendra Modi on July 4 congratulated US President Donald Trump and the American people on the landmark 250th anniversary of the United States’ independence, describing the India-US relationship as a force for global good rooted in shared democratic values. In a message posted on social media platform X, Modi ... The post Modi congratulates US on 250<sup>th</sup> Independence Anniversary, hails India-US partnership appeared first on India Strategic .

results.title: Argentina, Egypt, and Colombia Advance in Thrilling FIFA World Cup Matches
results.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has seen thrilling matches as Argentina, Egypt, and Colombia secure their places in the Round of 16. Argentina narrowly defeated debutants Cabo Verde in a dramatic extra-time match, while Egypt made history by winning their first knockout stage match against Australia in a penalty shootout. Colombia also advanced with a solid victory over Ghana. Discover the highlights and key moments from these exciting encounters.

results.title: Quote of the day from Paulo Coelho: 'Your dreams are not illusions; they are the fragments of a reality waiting for you to believe in them...' Brazilian writing legend shares a reminder to trust your dreams and keep going
results.description: Today's quote by Paulo Coelho, "Your dreams are not illusions; they are the fragments of a reality waiting for you to believe in them," encourages people to have faith in their aspirations and take action to achieve them. While the quote is widely attributed to the Brazilian author and is not a verified line from his published books, it reflects the central themes of The Alchemist.

results.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup LIVE UPDATES: Mbappe scores from the spot against Paraguay to book quarter finals berth
results.description: After stunning Germany on penalties, Paraguay now face 2022 runners-up France in a Round of 16 clash that could decide whether another World Cup fairytale lives on.
